chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1529 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Jawad Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Counsel for the petitioner and under instructions does not press instant Constitutional petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
